conclusion.uiShowsZeroBecause: partner-list returns 401; initApi() fails before updateStats(); HTML defaults remain 0

browserWithDevHeaders.note: PARTNER_ALLOW_DEV_HEADER is unset on production; X-Partner-Role is ignored

loggedInUserPartnerRole.note: partner-api.js always sends Authorization: Bearer <anon_key>, not the Supabase user session JWT. partner_role in app_metadata is never read client-side for this screen.

mockMode.source: builder/partner-mock-data.js (local UI only, not in DB)

liveApplyNote: P1 live verify (2026-06-23) created smoke-test rows (@example.test). Current 3 profiles match that pattern.
